full_text:
Xu Xiang (Gongbi)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Xiang, styledGongbi, was born in Runan. Associate of the eunuchs, he bribed his way to high rank. Appointed by eunuchs on He Jin’s death, he was executed by Yuan family. Xu Xiang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Xu Xiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
